feedItems.description: allocated £756.9m to Adult Social Care (≈£462 per resident)
allocated £398.1m to Children's Social Care (≈£243 per resident)
allocated £96.3m to Environment & Streets (≈£59 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £80 (5.0%) to £1691
